name: Black Bean Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely mash half the beans by hand.
2. Add remaining whole beans and all other ingredients; blend well.
3. Cover and chill.
4. Garnish with chopped cilantro or parsley.
Makes about 2 3/4 cups of dip.
Suggested Dippers: Bok Choy, Tortilla Chips, Corn Bread Croutons
